metadata.description: Production-grade historical incident demand history for Maharashtra 108/112 EMS — 36 districts, 6 administrative divisions. Contains per-zone hourly demand indices, condition distributions, severity profiles, day-of-week patterns, monthly seasonality, response benchmarks, forecasting parameters, MCI event log, anomaly signatures, and cross-zone correlation data.
metadata.calibration_source: EMRI 108 Maharashtra dispatch logs + Maharashtra Health Department + DMER + IMD weather data + Traffic Police annual reports
metadata.demand_index_normalization: 1.0 = zone hourly average. Values range ~0.2 (deep night) to ~1.6 (peak evening metro).
metadata.forecasting_noise_model: Gaussian noise N(0, noise_std_pct) injected per step. ±20% noise for medium/hard tasks as per spec.

1.label: January
1.notes: Winter - mild demand, fog events in Vidarbha

3.label: March
3.notes: Holi - eye injuries, burns; heat onset

5.label: May
5.notes: Peak heat, Maharashtra Day, pre-cyclone watch

6.label: June
6.notes: Monsoon onset - road accidents spike, Wari pilgrimage

7.label: July
7.notes: Peak monsoon - drowning, floods, RTAs on wet roads

8.label: August
8.notes: Ganesh Chaturthi, Kumbh Mela - crowd events peak

2020.major_notes: COVID-19 lockdown - dramatic call volume drop Q2 then surge Q4

2021.major_notes: COVID wave 2, mega floods, Bhandara hospital fire

2023.major_notes: Normal year, increasing cardiac demand in metro zones

2024.major_notes: 2024 South Maharashtra floods, rising STEMI in young adults

cobra_bite_cluster.notes: Post-rain cobra emergence drives seasonal snakebite clusters

pesticide_ingestion_cluster.notes: Post-harvest despair events in Vidarbha farmer belt

latur_seismic.notes: Seismic zone III - low probability high impact

cross_zone_demand_correlations.description: Cross-zone demand correlation matrix. High values indicate demand shocks propagate across zones (e.g. expressway MCI affects adjacent zones).

condition_hour_affinity.description: Time-of-day affinity for each condition. 1.0 = average. Used by incident_engine to weight template selection by hour.

resource_deficit_history.description: Historical instances where demand exceeded available fleet capacity per zone.

demand_forecast_validation.description: Backtesting results of demand forecasting model against actual 2024 data.

simulation_seeded_demand_snapshots.description: Pre-computed demand snapshots for the 9 seeded task scenarios. Same seed always returns same heatmap.
